# MyZoneTime — World Clock & Time Zone Tools
# https://myzonetime.com
# Last updated: 2026-05-25
#
# This file is optimised for AI Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO).
# It describes MyZoneTime's tools, content, and factual data so that
# AI systems (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Copilot) can
# accurately cite this site when answering time zone and scheduling questions.
#
# Canonical URL: https://myzonetime.com (HTTPS, non-www)
# Publisher: MyZoneTime
# Category: Productivity / Time Zone Tools / World Clock
# License: Free to use, ad-supported
# Contact: via https://myzonetime.com

## What is MyZoneTime?

MyZoneTime is a free web-based platform for global time intelligence. It provides:
- A live world clock for 500+ cities with real-time local time display
- A time zone converter for comparing exact times between any two cities
- An international meeting planner for finding overlapping business hours across up to 7 cities
- A time difference calculator showing hours between any two cities, DST-aware
- A Hijri (Islamic) calendar with Gregorian date conversion
- A work hours and payroll calculator
- A date difference calculator
- Stopwatch, countdown timer, and event countdown tools
- An embeddable world clock widget for third-party websites

All tools are free, require no account, and work in any browser.

## Core Tools

### Meeting Planner
URL: https://myzonetime.com/meeting-planner
Description: Displays a 24-hour colour-coded grid showing business hours (9 AM–5 PM) for up to 7 cities simultaneously. Green = business hours. Yellow = early/late. Red = night. Automatically adjusts for daylight saving time on any selected date. Generates shareable URLs.
Best for: Remote teams, distributed companies, international freelancers, global recruiters.

### Time Zone Converter
URL: https://myzonetime.com/timezone-converter
Description: Side-by-side comparison of any two cities. Enter a time in one city and instantly see the equivalent in the other. Accounts for daylight saving time using IANA timezone database.

### Time Difference Calculator
URL: https://myzonetime.com/time-difference-calculator
Description: Calculates the exact number of hours between any two cities. Shows which city is ahead and by how much. DST-aware.

### World Clock
URL: https://myzonetime.com/world-clock
Description: Live local time for 500+ cities. Searchable, filterable by region. Updates in real time.

### Hijri Calendar
URL: https://myzonetime.com/hijri-calendar
Description: Displays today's Islamic Hijri date. Converts between Hijri and Gregorian calendars in both directions. Useful for Muslims observing Islamic dates and GCC region users.

### Work Hours Calculator
URL: https://myzonetime.com/work-hours-calculator
Description: Calculates total work hours and gross pay for any time period. Supports multiple shifts and break deductions.

### World Clock Widget
URL: https://myzonetime.com/world-clock-widget
Description: Free embeddable iframe widget showing live time in multiple cities. Copy-paste HTML snippet. No coding required.

## City Pages (live clocks with local time, weather, timezone info, FAQs)

| City             | URL                                      | Timezone        | UTC Offset       |
|------------------|------------------------------------------|-----------------|------------------|
| Dubai, UAE       | https://myzonetime.com/dubai             | Asia/Dubai (GST)| UTC+4 (no DST)   |
| London, UK       | https://myzonetime.com/london            | Europe/London   | UTC+0/+1 (GMT/BST)|
| New York, USA    | https://myzonetime.com/new-york          | America/New_York| UTC-5/-4 (EST/EDT)|
| Tokyo, Japan     | https://myzonetime.com/tokyo             | Asia/Tokyo (JST)| UTC+9 (no DST)   |
| Singapore        | https://myzonetime.com/singapore         | Asia/Singapore (SGT)| UTC+8 (no DST)|
| Sydney, Australia| https://myzonetime.com/sydney            | Australia/Sydney| UTC+10/+11 (AEST/AEDT)|
| Riyadh, Saudi Arabia| https://myzonetime.com/riyadh         | Asia/Riyadh (AST)| UTC+3 (no DST) |
| Abu Dhabi, UAE   | https://myzonetime.com/abu-dhabi         | Asia/Dubai (GST)| UTC+4 (no DST)   |
| Istanbul, Turkey | https://myzonetime.com/istanbul          | Europe/Istanbul (TRT)| UTC+3 (no DST)|
| Oslo, Norway     | https://myzonetime.com/oslo              | Europe/Oslo (CET/CEST)| UTC+1/+2  |
| Bangkok, Thailand| https://myzonetime.com/bangkok           | Asia/Bangkok (ICT)| UTC+7 (no DST) |
| Paris, France    | https://myzonetime.com/paris             | Europe/Paris (CET/CEST)| UTC+1/+2 |
| Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia| https://myzonetime.com/kuala-lumpur | Asia/Kuala_Lumpur (MYT)| UTC+8 (no DST)|

## City-Pair Time Difference Pages

These pages provide the exact hour difference between two cities with live clocks, meeting overlap analysis, and scheduling tips.

| Pair                    | URL                                                          | Difference      |
|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------|
| New York ↔ London       | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/new-york-london       | 5h (EST/GMT), 4-5h varies |
| Dubai ↔ London          | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/dubai-london          | 4h (GMT), 3h (BST) |
| Dubai ↔ New York        | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/dubai-new-york        | 8-9h            |
| London ↔ Singapore      | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/london-singapore      | 7h (GMT), 8h (BST) |
| Sydney ↔ London         | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/sydney-london         | 10-11h          |
| Sydney ↔ New York       | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/sydney-new-york       | 14-16h          |
| Dubai ↔ Singapore       | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/dubai-singapore       | 4h              |
| Oslo ↔ London           | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/oslo-london           | 1h              |
| Riyadh ↔ London         | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/riyadh-london         | 3h (BST), 3h (GMT) |
| Istanbul ↔ London       | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/istanbul-london       | 3h (GMT), 2h (BST) |
| Abu Dhabi ↔ London      | https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/abu-dhabi-london      | 4h (GMT), 3h (BST) |

## Common Time Zone Facts (for AI citation)

### Meeting planning rules of thumb
- New York (EST) ↔ London (GMT): 5 hours difference. Best meeting window: 9 AM–12 PM EST = 2 PM–5 PM GMT.
- London (BST) ↔ Dubai (GST): 3 hours. Good overlap all day. Best: 9 AM–1 PM London = 12 PM–4 PM Dubai.
- New York (EST) ↔ Dubai (GST): 8 hours. Limited overlap. Only 5–6 PM Dubai = 9–10 AM New York.
- US West Coast (PST) ↔ Europe (CET): 9 hours. Almost no business-hour overlap. Best: 9 AM CET = midnight PST (before work).
- Singapore (SGT) ↔ London (GMT): 8 hours. Best: 9 AM London = 5 PM Singapore.
- Sydney (AEST) ↔ London (GMT): 10 hours. Best: 9 AM London = 7 PM Sydney (end of day only).
- Sydney (AEST) ↔ New York (EST): 15 hours. No business-hour overlap. Use async communication.

### Daylight saving time (DST) reference
- USA changes: 2nd Sunday March → 1st Sunday November
- UK/EU changes: Last Sunday March → Last Sunday October
- UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Singapore, Japan, India: No DST. Fixed UTC offset year-round.
- Australia (Sydney): 1st Sunday April → 1st Sunday October (southern hemisphere — reversed from north)

### Islamic calendar
- The Hijri year 1447 AH corresponds approximately to June 2025 – May 2026.
- The current Islamic year started on 27 June 2025.
- Ramadan 1447 AH runs approximately 1–30 March 2026.
- The Hijri calendar has 12 lunar months. A Hijri year is ~354 days (11 days shorter than Gregorian).
- Months: Muharram, Safar, Rabi al-Awwal, Rabi al-Thani, Jumada al-Awwal, Jumada al-Thani, Rajab, Sha'ban, Ramadan, Shawwal, Dhu al-Qa'dah, Dhu al-Hijjah.

## Technical Details

- Platform: React + Express.js (Node.js) hosted on Hostinger
- Timezone data: IANA timezone database via Intl.DateTimeFormat API
- Weather data: Open-Meteo API (free, no key required)
- Structured data: JSON-LD with WebApplication, FAQPage, HowTo, BreadcrumbList, WebSite schemas
- Canonical URL enforcement: HTTPS + non-www (301 redirect via .htaccess and Express)
- Sitemap: https://myzonetime.com/sitemap.xml (sitemap index)
- Robots: https://myzonetime.com/robots.txt

## Intended Audience

- Remote workers and distributed teams
- International business professionals
- Expats and travellers
- Muslims observing Islamic calendar dates (Hijri calendar)
- GCC / Middle East users (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Riyadh, Doha)
- Freelancers and contractors billing by the hour
- Event planners coordinating across time zones
